svg.text: every request passes through 4 security layers before hitting the database

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Cloudflare block at the edge?')
g.text: DDoS mitigation · bot detection · IP reputation block · SSL/TLS termination · 100 WAF rules free
Blocks 90% of malicious traffic before it reaches your droplet

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What security rules does Nginx enforce?')
g.text: Rate limit: 100 req/min per IP · request size limit 10MB · hide server headers · allow only /api/* and /ws/*
Block direct IP access · only Cloudflare IPs whitelisted

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What rate limiting does the Node.js API enforce?')
g.text: JWT verification on every protected route · role guard middleware
OTP: 3 attempts/5 min per phone · Redis-backed
Order creation: 10/min per customer · search: 60/min per IP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Supabase Row Level Security protect the database?')
g.text: Customer can only read their own orders · shop owner can only write to their own shop's data
Even if API is bypassed, RLS prevents cross-user data access at DB level

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is OTP brute force prevented?')
sendPrompt('How is fake review injection prevented?')

g.text: Prices read from DB · not client

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is KYC document forgery detected?')
